speaker: seller

args.message: Legendary 5.0L Coyote V8 power in a head-turning package! This well-maintained GT features the premium audio system, leather-trimmed seats, and that unmistakable exhaust note. Perfect for the enthusiast looking for classic American muscle at an affordable price.

args.message: Not that I'm aware of! She's a clean car, runs like a dream. That's a real beauty you've got here, a true gem. You don't see many Mustangs this sharp anymore, especially with the Coyote engine. I had someone looking at it just last week who was very impressed.
